resolved_findings.title: Job claim is not cross-process atomic
resolved_findings.evidence: Accepted as a Phase 5.2 scope boundary. The run handoff and verification record state that this slice proves local single-process scheduler execution only and that multi-worker claim locking remains future work.

resolved_findings.title: Dash-prefixed queue option values require equals form
resolved_findings.evidence: Accepted as a CLI edge-case limitation. Python argparse itself rejects space-separated option values that begin with --, while the implemented equals form is supported and covered by tests.

resolved_findings.title: Invalid job_id error text changed
resolved_findings.evidence: Accepted as a non-blocking error wording change. Tests assert the new safer single-segment validation message, and no stable external error-text contract exists in this repository.

not_tested: Real GitHub Actions execution for this branch.
residual_risks: Phase 5.2 has no cross-process job claim lock or compare-and-swap primitive.
Dash-prefixed queue option values require the --key=value form.
Remote GitHub Actions verification remains pending until the branch is pushed.
notes: External Claude Code review completed with status findings and no medium, high, or critical findings. Low findings were triaged as documented Phase 5.2 scope boundaries or non-blocking CLI/error-text limitations.
